reviews.comment:
Tuve que esperar el remolque que nunca llego y me quedé en ese lugar y el playero me cargo el teléfono y acada rato me pregunta si precisas algo un genio....

(Translated by Google)
I had to wait for the tow truck that never arrived, so I was stuck there. The attendant charged my phone and kept asking me if I needed anything—what a character!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0bUxXU3dRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención del personal es excelente, es una parada que hacemos siempre al regreso de las vacaciones, es muy cómodo el lugar

(Translated by Google)
The staff's service is excellent; it's a place we always stop on our way back from vacation. It's very comfortable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURONzk3Ny1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar,dispone de parrillas,piletas para lavar utensilios,baños muy limpios y una buena sombra de árboles añosos. Excelente lugar

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place, with grills, sinks for washing dishes, very clean bathrooms, and good shade from mature trees. Excellent spot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROdTdHWjN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Después de 17 hs de viaje, el primer baño al que de pudo entrar. Súper limpio, como mujer, fue una felicidad después de tantas horas. En el shop habían cosas muy ricas y en la playa pudimos llenar el tanque para seguir viaje. El personal muy atento. Sin dudas volveré a pasar en mis próximos viajes

(Translated by Google)
After a 17-hour journey, we finally got to use the first restroom we could find. It was super clean, and as a woman, it was such a relief after so many hours. The shop had some delicious things, and we were able to fill up the tank on the beach to continue our trip. The staff was very attentive. I will definitely stop by again on my next trips.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROM2VySXN3RRAB
